  • Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope used by com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope 
    Class Description
    AbstractApplicationScope
    ApplicationScope for the main and test codebases.
    AbstractGlobalConfiguration
    Base class for GlobalConfigurable instances.
    ApplicationScope
    The configuration of an application.
    DefaultJvmScope
    The default implementation of JvmScope.
    GlobalConfiguration
    The global configuration inherited by all verifiers.
    JvmScope
    The JVM configuration.
    MainApplicationScope
    ApplicationScope for the main codebase.
    ThreadConfiguration
    Configures the behavior of all verifiers invoked by the current thread.
